mapper.select: select 'dish' as biz_type, d.id as source_id, d.name, d.description, d.category_id, c.name as category_name, d.price, d.image, d.status, ifnull(c.status, 0) as category_status, d.update_time from dish d left join category c on c.id = d.category_id

select 'setmeal' as biz_type, s.id as source_id, s.name, s.description, s.category_id, c.name as category_name, s.price, s.image, s.status, ifnull(c.status, 0) as category_status, s.update_time from setmeal s left join category c on c.id = s.category_id

select 'dish' as biz_type, d.id as source_id, d.name, d.description, d.category_id, c.name as category_name, d.price, d.image, d.status, ifnull(c.status, 0) as category_status, d.update_time from dish d left join category c on c.id = d.category_id where d.id = #{id}

select 'setmeal' as biz_type, s.id as source_id, s.name, s.description, s.category_id, c.name as category_name, s.price, s.image, s.status, ifnull(c.status, 0) as category_status, s.update_time from setmeal s left join category c on c.id = s.category_id where s.id = #{id}
